positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest landscape, viewed from a cross-section perspective. The main subject is a vibrant, bioluminescent mushroom cluster growing around a gently meandering river, surrounded by stylized fern fronds and oversized, smooth river stones. The color palette should feature deep midnight blues, electric neon greens, and soft coral accents, set against a dark, velvety background. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and geometric simplicity suitable for repeating print patterns. Highly detailed linework with flat color application, vector art aesthetic, mid-century modern influence, clean edges, perfect symmetry, centered composition, high contrast, suitable for apparel print.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, blur, grain, noisy, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, realistic photography, jpeg artifacts, gradients, smudged, messy lines
